full_text: Mark Wood to Klaasen, , Klaasen Run Out!! !! You absolute beauty. He has done something similar against Steve Smith in the semi final of the 2019 World Cup and now Klaasen is at the receiving end. It was a poor delivery from Mark Wood and to make matters worse, the England skipper didn't gather the ball cleanly either. Short and sprayed down leg, Klaasen allows it to sail over and Buttler fumbles while diving across to his left. The ball, however, deflects a few yards to his left allowing the skipper to take a sharp aim at the non-striker's end. Klaasen was a bit casual and didn't expect the ball to hit the stumps direct. Too good.

full_text: Maharaj to Buttler, Caught by Klaasen!! The first time Buttler tries to play across the line and against the turn he perishes. Smart of Maharaj to keep it within the stumps and force a leg-side hit when Buttler was so keen on reverse-sweeping him to the off-side. Buttler went for the slog-sweep, got it on the outer half of the bat and it flew straight to deep mid-wicket. Could have played him out but decided to attack and perished. This is getting interesting. England three down.

full_text: Maharaj to Bairstow, Caught by Nortje!! Excellent catch from Nortje. South Africa did well to frustrate Bairstow with plenty of dots in the last couple of overs and he tries to find a release shot against the spinner. No dice! Short and wide, Bairstow cuts in the air and Nortje moves swiftly to his right to pluck the ball out of thin air before completing the dive. England two down.
